goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 13:15' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alpha-milton guest house'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on sunday and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 13:15 and should depart from broxbourne
Make sure you get train ID and price
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called alpha-milton guest house
Make sure you get price range
